---
title: "PPE Empirical Coverage Under Competing Risks"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

source("../plots/ecr_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/absolute_bias_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/bias_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/rmse_graph_function.R")

results_df <- read_csv("tables/final_results_complete.csv")
```

## Empirical Coverage

```{r fig-ecr-coverage, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE empirical coverage under competing risks."}
plot_ecr(results_df)
```


## Absolute Bias

```{r fig-absolute-bias, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE bias under competing risks."}
plot_absolute_bias(results_df)
```


## Bias

```{r fig-bias, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE bias under competing risks."}
plot_bias(results_df)
```


## Root Mean Square Error

```{r fig-rmse, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE root mean square error under competing risks."}
plot_rmse(results_df)
```
